description: The Outlaws Motorcycle Club, also known as the American Outlaws Association, is an international motorcycle gang founded in 1935 in McCook, Illinois. Classified as an organized crime syndicate by law enforcement, it is involved in drug trafficking, extortion, money laundering, and violent acts. The club has over 5,000 members across 441 chapters in 43 countries and is still active.

country_links.evidence_quote: The club's first chapter in Belgium was formed in Mechelen on 5 March 1999.
country_links.context: The Outlaws have multiple chapters in Belgium, including a first chapter formed in Mechelen in 1999, and have been involved in violent incidents there.

country_links.evidence_quote: The Outlaws entered Canada on 1 July 1977 when a number of Satan's Choice chapters under the leadership of Garnet 'Mother' McEwen 'patched over' to join the Outlaws.
country_links.context: The Outlaws entered Canada in 1977 when Satan's Choice chapters patched over, and they maintain chapters in Newfoundland and Labrador and Ontario.

country_links.evidence_quote: The investigation involved suspects from Finland, the United Kingdom, Sweden, Estonia, the United States, and Hungary.
country_links.context: Suspects from Estonia were involved in the 2023-2024 drug trafficking case.

country_links.evidence_quote: The Outlaws entered Finland via Russia, when a feeder club called Fifteen MC South Karelia was established in Lappeenranta in 2012...
country_links.context: The Outlaws established chapters in Finland via a feeder club in 2012, and members were involved in a 2023-2024 drug trafficking case distributing drugs in Finland.

country_links.evidence_quote: The single-engine propeller aircraft departed from Hungary and made a refueling stop in Lithuania before arriving in Finland.
country_links.context: A cocaine shipment to Finland departed from Hungary, and Hungarian nationals were involved in the drug trafficking case.

country_links.evidence_quote: Police later learned that the same individuals were arrested in Ireland on 1 December 2023 with approximately 60 kilograms of heroin in their possession...
country_links.context: Hungarian nationals involved in the Outlaws' drug trafficking were arrested in Ireland with heroin.

country_links.evidence_quote: ...both were accepted as full-member chapters—Midland (Jyväskylä) and South-Karelia (Lappeenranta)—alongside a Lithuanian chapter in Kaunas.
country_links.context: A Lithuanian chapter in Kaunas was accepted as a full-member chapter alongside Finnish chapters in 2018.

country_links.evidence_quote: The Outlaws in Georgia obtain methamphetamine from Mexican cartels and also transport the drug into the state from Mexico...
country_links.context: The Outlaws obtain methamphetamine from Mexican cartels and transport it into Georgia from Mexico.

country_links.evidence_quote: ...when a feeder club called Fifteen MC South Karelia was established in Lappeenranta in 2012 with support from a Russian Outlaws chapter.
country_links.context: The Outlaws had a Russian chapter that supported the establishment of a feeder club in Finland.

country_links.evidence_quote: Of the cocaine shipment, 10 kilograms were delivered to Swedish national Abbas Abdulaziz Mohammad...
country_links.context: Swedish national Abbas Abdulaziz Mohammad received 10 kilograms of cocaine from the Outlaws' shipment in Finland.

country_links.evidence_quote: The Outlaws expanded into the United Kingdom in February 2000 after amalgamating the Midland Outlaws...
country_links.context: The Outlaws expanded into the UK in 2000 by amalgamating the Midland Outlaws, and have chapters in England and Wales involved in drug trafficking.

country_links.evidence_quote: The dominant biker gang in the Great Lakes region, the Outlaws are based primarily in the Midwest, the Northeast and the Southeast, with more than 700 members and 86 chapters in twenty U.S. states.
country_links.context: The Outlaws have chapters and operate criminal activities across multiple U.S. states.
